meaning: satellite antimissile observation system 卫星反导弹观测系统  萨摩斯岛[希腊](在爱琴海东部)
examples: Zeus and hera spent their wedding night on samos, and it lasted three hundred years .
When Augustus was returning from Samos after the winter of 20, he met the poet in Athens.
An island of southeast Greece in the Aegean sea west of Samos. According to Greek legend, Icarus plummeted into the sea near the island.
The confederation, also known as the Dodecapolis, had its common meeting place at the Panionium, on the mainland opposite Samos.
Though born in Samos, Pythagoras is considered a local son.
